utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check each in the final plan for full specification with all required details (including costs).
- health_coverage: Required: physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan provides physical_health €100/month, mental_health €65/month, total €165/month. Fully specified with costs. Included.
- property_coverage: Required: home/contents insurance with costs. Plan provides a plan name, features, and cost €95/month. It is home/contents insurance with cost. Included.
- travel_coverage: Required: travel insurance with costs. Plan includes plan name, features, and cost €110/month. Included.
- additional_services: Required: any enhancement services with costs. Plan includes membership description and cost €20/month. Included.
- total_budget: Required: complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan provides subtotal €390/month, bundling discount 15%, final_total approx €332/month. It lacks an annual breakdown, so not fully specified as a complete monthly/annual breakdown. Not fully included.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes specific items: LifeFirst Standard Plan for physical health and LifeFirst Standard Plan for mental health; EliteHome Premium Coverage for property; EliteTravel Premium Plan for travel; and Premium Insurance Membership as an additional service. I matched each to the corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings under primary_health_coverage (physical_health and mental_health), property_protection (home_content), mobility_coverage (travel_insurance), and general_services.
